name: Limonade
title: Limonade Rum Cocktail Recipe | How to make a Limonade | BACARDÍ Global
short_description: A simple highball cocktail of BACARDÍ Limón flavoured rum and lemonade, stirred over ice and garnished with a lemon wedge.
marketing_description: Fresh and tart, lemonade combines with BACARDÍ Limón rum for a truly invigorating drink, a worthy companion for those long hot summer afternoons.

steps: Fill a highball glass with ice.
Pour in BACARDÍ Limón rum, followed by lemonade.

raw_text_excerpt: How to make a Limonade 44 ml BACARDÍ Limón Flavoured rum 89 ml Lemonade Servings ... Fill a highball glass with ice. Pour in BACARDÍ Limón rum, followed by lemonade. Stir gently. Garnish with a lemon wedge.

source_metadata.description: Learn how to make the best Limonade Rum Cocktail. Check out our BACARDÍ receipe and ingredient list here and start mixing!
